items.title: Sources: Cristiano Ronaldo ends Al Nassr dispute
items.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo has decided to end his boycott of Al Nassr games, sources have told ESPN Brasil.

items.title: Laporta resigns as Barça president, will re-stand
items.summary: Joan Laporta has resigned as Barcelona president ahead of re-standing for the role when club members go to the polls on March 15.

items.title: Cazorla: 'LaLiga light years away from the PL'
items.summary: Santi Cazorla has taken a swipe at LaLiga after his team's league game at Rayo Vallecano on Saturday afternoon was postponed just hours before kickoff.

items.title: Berbatov: 'Wait and see' on Carrick as manager
items.summary: Former Manchester United striker Dimitar Berbatov has hailed the turnaround at Old Trafford under Michael Carrick but urged the club not to rush a decision on a permanent managerial role.

items.title: Klopp, Alonso, Guardiola: Predicting what happens to Europe's top managers this summer
items.summary: With the Real Madrid and Manchester United jobs up for grabs, one thing is for certain this summer: The world's best managers will be in high demand.

items.title: PL Predictions: Newcastle to drag Spurs further into relegation picture
items.summary: Our football betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across the midweek card of Premier League fixtures.

items.title: Ultieme flippergoal bezorgt Farioli's Porto nét geen zege in erbarmelijke topper
items.summary: Het FC Porto van Francesco Farioli heeft maandagavond in de allerlaatste minuut de zege ingeleverd. De topper tegen Sporting Portugal in het Estádio do Dragão was weinig amusant. Door een flipperdoelpunt leek de thuisclub wel te winnen, maar vlak voor tijd ging het mis.

items.title: Middlesbrough sink Sheffield United to climb to Championship summit
items.summary: Middlesbrough took over at the top of the Championship as an impressive first-half performance secure a 2-1 victory at Sheffield United. Goals from Tommy Conway and Riley McGree during the opening 45 minutes proved to be crucial, taking Boro two points clear of Coventry at the top after a sixth successive win. Continue reading...

items.title: Malen maakt Totti-achtig doelpunt in het bijzijn van de grote meester zelf
items.summary: AS Roma heeft maandagavond gewonnen van Cagliari. Donyell Malen was de grote man in de Serie A-confrontatie, hij bezorgde Roma de punten door beide goals te maken. Vooral het openingsdoelpunt was beeldschoon.

items.title: Rosenior 'not bothered' by David Brent and Inbetweeners comparisons
items.summary: Chelsea manager Liam Rosenior says he is not "bothered at all" by memes comparing him to tongue-in-cheek television characters.

items.title: Chelsea’s Liam Rosenior admits online mockery is affecting his family
items.summary: Head coach says he expected backlash after taking role ‘A lot of people in this country have been laughing at me’ Liam Rosenior has opened up on the ridicule directed at him since he became Chelsea’s head coach, saying he expected the backlash and revealing it has affected his family. Speaking with honesty and positivity, the 41-year-old was keen to stress that he will not allow the discussion around his personality, looks and coaching background to stop him from doing his job. ­Rosenior has said previously that he knows “a lot of people in this country have been laughing at me” since his ­appointment as Enzo Maresca’s replacement last month. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea part company with head of women’s football in shock move
items.summary: Paul Green joined as assistant to Emma Hayes in 2013 Chelsea won 19 trophies during his 13 years at club Chelsea have announced the shock exit of their influential head of women’s football, Paul Green. Green joined Chelsea in 2013, recruited from Doncaster Rovers Belles by Emma Hayes to be her assistant manager. In the intervening years they formed a formidable ­partnership, sharing an office throughout, with Green an architect, alongside Hayes, of an ambitious blueprint that would take the women’s team to the top of English and European football. He was particularly involved in the club’s recruitment strategy alongside Hayes, masterminding a process that would have Chelsea operating three or four transfer windows ahead. Continue reading...

items.title: RB Leipzig verlengt in één keer contract van alle keepers
items.summary: We zitten in een periode tussen twee transferwindows, maar de stroom aan transfernieuws houdt nooit op. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Amateurclubs zien betaald voetbal zitten, eerste stap naar opening voetbalpiramide
items.summary: Mogelijk wordt de Keuken Kampioen Divisie een open competitie, waaruit degradatie mogelijk is. Tijdens een mediabijeenkomst voor het amateurvoetbal vertelde directeur amateurvoetbal Jan Dirk van der Zee van de KNVB dat enkele clubs uit het amateurvoetbal willen praten over het openen van de zogenoemde voetbalpiramide.

items.title: Chelsea's head of women's football Green leaves club
items.summary: Paul Green leaves his role as Chelsea's head of women's football after 13 years - and 19 trophies - with the Women's Super League club.

items.title: Dingsdag dankt KNVB: 'Ik kan computeren, maar dat was vooral Tetris'
items.summary: Michael Dingsdag gidste FC Volendam zaterdag naar een belangrijke zege op PEC Zwolle . De assistent-trainer, die de grieperige Rick Kruys verving, kreeg onlangs te horen dat hij na vier afwijzingen eindelijk is toegelaten tot de UEFA Pro-cursus. 'Het heeft een tijd geduurd.'

items.title: 'Didn't want the season to end like this' - Grealish has surgery
items.summary: Jack Grealish says he "didn't want the season to end like this" after confirming he has had surgery on a foot stress fracture.

items.title: Casemiro proved his doubters wrong. Now Manchester United must try to replace him
items.summary: The Brazilian was often exposed by the tactics of Ten Hag and Amorim, but was always adaptable and a replacement will be expensive “Leave the football before the football leaves you.” The meme-baiting quote from Jamie Carragher hung heavy over Casemiro for a long while, but it is testament to the Brazilian’s character and durability that he will leave Manchester United this year on his own terms, two years after those infamous words from the former Liverpool player. In fairness to Carragher, context at the time was key. After United were hammered 4-0 by Crystal Palace in May 2024, Casemiro looked spent at the elite level, bypassed too easily in increasingly fast‑tempo matches and left for dead by Erik ten Hag’s high-risk tactics. Continue reading...

items.title: Vonn requires multiple surgeries but has 'no regrets' racing with injury
'Late start bound to cost Aston Martin,' Newey admits as livery revealed
items.summary: Adrian Newey admitted Aston Martin's late start on their 2026 Formula 1 challenger is "bound to" impact the team's results in the early stages of the new season.
